message:
test(parser): add adversarial corpus fixtures and reducer promotion policy tests

Add parser_corpus_promotion_policy.rs integration test that validates
normative and adversarial fixture catalogs against deterministic AST
hashes and verifies reducer promotion policy compatibility with the
canonical AST schema and diagnostics taxonomy.

New fixture files:
- parser_phase0_adversarial_fixtures.json: adversarial parse vectors
- parser_reducer_promotion_policy.json: promotion-policy contract vectors

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,66 @@
+{
+  "schema_version": "franken-engine.parser-phase0.adversarial-fixtures.v1",
+  "parser_mode": "scalar_reference",
+  "fixtures": [
+    {
+      "id": "adv_empty_source_script",
+      "family_id": "adversarial.empty_source",
+      "goal": "script",
+      "source": "   \n\t  ",
+      "expected_parse_error": "empty_source",
+      "expected_diagnostic_code": "FE-PARSER-DIAG-EMPTY-SOURCE-0001",
+      "severity": "error",
+      "provenance_tag": "corpus.adversarial.empty_source.v1"
+    },
+    {
+      "id": "adv_import_missing_clause_module",
+      "family_id": "adversarial.import.missing_clause",
+      "goal": "module",
+      "source": "import",
+      "expected_parse_error": "unsupported_syntax",
+      "expected_diagnostic_code": "FE-PARSER-DIAG-UNSUPPORTED-SYNTAX-0001",
+      "severity": "error",
+      "provenance_tag": "corpus.adversarial.import_missing_clause.v1"
+    },
+    {
+      "id": "adv_export_missing_clause_module",
+      "family_id": "adversarial.export.missing_clause",
+      "goal": "module",
+      "source": "export",
+      "expected_parse_error": "unsupported_syntax",
+      "expected_diagnostic_code": "FE-PARSER-DIAG-UNSUPPORTED-SYNTAX-0001",
+      "severity": "error",
+      "provenance_tag": "corpus.adversarial.export_missing_clause.v1"
+    },
+    {
+      "id": "adv_import_in_script_goal",
+      "family_id": "adversarial.goal_violation.import_in_script",
+      "goal": "script",
+      "source": "import dep from \"pkg\"",
+      "expected_parse_error": "invalid_goal",
+      "expected_diagnostic_code": "FE-PARSER-DIAG-INVALID-GOAL-0001",
+      "severity": "error",
+      "provenance_tag": "corpus.adversarial.import_in_script_goal.v1"
+    },
+    {
+      "id": "adv_export_in_script_goal",
+      "family_id": "adversarial.goal_violation.export_in_script",
+      "goal": "script",
+      "source": "export default 1",
+      "expected_parse_error": "invalid_goal",
+      "expected_diagnostic_code": "FE-PARSER-DIAG-INVALID-GOAL-0001",
+      "severity": "error",
+      "provenance_tag": "corpus.adversarial.export_in_script_goal.v1"
+    },
+    {
+      "id": "adv_import_unquoted_source",
+      "family_id": "adversarial.import.unquoted_source",
+      "goal": "module",
+      "source": "import dep from pkg",
+      "expected_parse_error": "unsupported_syntax",
+      "expected_diagnostic_code": "FE-PARSER-DIAG-UNSUPPORTED-SYNTAX-0001",
+      "severity": "error",
+      "provenance_tag": "corpus.adversarial.import_unquoted_source.v1"
+    }
+  ]
+}

@@ -0,0 +1,32 @@
+{
+  "schema_version": "franken-engine.parser-reducer-promotion.policy.v1",
+  "policy_id": "policy-parser-reducer-promotion-v1",
+  "parser_mode": "scalar_reference",
+  "ast_contract_schema": "franken-engine.parser-ast.schema.v1",
+  "diagnostics_schema": "franken-engine.parser-diagnostics.schema.v1",
+  "diagnostics_taxonomy": "franken-engine.parser-diagnostics.taxonomy.v1",
+  "provenance_hash_algorithm": "sha256",
+  "promotion_rules": [
+    {
+      "corpus": "normative",
+      "requires_expected_hash": true,
+      "requires_expected_diagnostic_code": false,
+      "requires_ast_contract_compat": true,
+      "requires_diag_compat": false
+    },
+    {
+      "corpus": "adversarial",
+      "requires_expected_hash": false,
+      "requires_expected_diagnostic_code": true,
+      "requires_ast_contract_compat": true,
+      "requires_diag_compat": true
+    }
+  ],
+  "auto_promote": {
+    "max_source_bytes": 512,
+    "allowed_outcomes": [
+      "promote"
+    ],
+    "requires_replay_command": true
+  }
+}
